## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Dog;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Dog { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
animal, pet, puppy, hound, canine

## Categories
animals

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/dog)
